# Stoic AgentOS
> The open-source operating system for AI agent fleets.

## What is Stoic AgentOS?
Stoic AgentOS is a production-grade platform for monitoring, orchestrating, and persisting knowledge across autonomous AI agent fleets. It provides observability, three-tier memory, compliance governance, and Claude-powered AI diagnostics in a single premium dashboard.

## Key Capabilities
- LLM call tracing with per-model cost attribution (OpenAI, Anthropic, custom)
- Three-tier memory system: Working (session TTL), Episodic (event timeline), Semantic (knowledge triplets)
- Compliance audit trails with immutable logging and circuit breakers
- Auto-instrumentation for OpenAI and Anthropic SDKs (3 lines of code)
- Claude-powered AI diagnostics with 6 analysis modes
- Multi-org RBAC with BYOK (Bring Your Own Key) Anthropic integration
- Knowledge graph visualization with force-directed layout
- Multi-workspace management across Git repositories
- Webhook-driven alerting and notification system
- Full OpenAPI 3.1 specification (55+ endpoints across 19 route modules)

## Architecture
- Frontend: React 19 + Vite 8 (SPA, deployed on Vercel)
- Backend: Express.js + TypeScript (deployed on Railway via Docker)
- Database: Supabase PostgreSQL with Row Level Security + Vault encryption
- AI Engine: Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5 (fast) + Sonnet 4.6 (deep analysis)
- Billing: Stripe (checkout + customer portal + webhooks)
- Auth: Supabase Auth (email + GitHub + Google OAuth)

## SDK Installation
npm install stoic-agentos-sdk   # Node.js / TypeScript
pip install stoicos              # Python 3.9+

## Quick Start (3 lines)
import { AgentOS } from 'stoic-agentos-sdk';
const os = new AgentOS({ apiKey: 'sk_live_xxx' });
const agent = os.wrapAgent('my-agent', async (input) => processInput(input));

## Pricing
Free: $0/month — 5 agents, 10,000 observations/month, 2 workspaces
Pro: $29/month — 25 agents, 100,000 observations/month, 10 workspaces
Team: $79/month — 100 agents, unlimited observations, 15 members
Enterprise: Custom pricing — unlimited everything, SSO/SAML, SLA guarantee
